---
ID: US-CMP-FE-212
Title: Asset add/remove and display in detail/posting views
Status: Not Started
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-212
Epic: CMP-E2: Content Drafting and Asseting
---

As a contributor or posting owner
I want asset links/files attached to content so I can publish with required collateral.
So posting execution is not blocked by missing files.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] User can add/remove asset records without changing lifecycle state.
- [ ] URL assets are validated before save.
- [ ] Asset cards display in content detail and posting view.
- [ ] Inaccessible asset links show warning state without crashing page.
- [ ] Asset changes are logged in activity.
